## 💡 Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case? -->
<!-- Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" -->

## Proposed API / Solution

<!-- How do you envision this working? Show a code example if possible. -->

```tsx
// Example of how you'd like the feature to work
import { Camera } from 'react-webcam-pro';

<Camera
  // your proposed new prop here
/>
```

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Any alternative solutions you've considered? -->

## Is this available in `react-camera-pro`?

- [ ] Yes — it existed in `react-camera-pro` and was removed / broken
- [ ] No — this is a new feature request

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or examples from other libraries. -->
